summary: Implemented a read/write-gated crew launch focus bind request planner. It verifies the launch intent sequence, plans the carrier request, and in authorized apply mode writes only .narada/crew/launch-requests evidence with status awaiting_admitted_carrier. No launch, shortcut creation, PC-locus mutation, or operator-surface runtime mutation occurred.
residuals: Actual launch/focus/bind execution remains outside this admitted chapter until an external carrier/supervisor with PC/operator-surface authority is admitted.
